papers.title: 并行稀疏系统直接求解库SuperLU_MT在状态估计中的应用
papers.titleEn: Application of Parallel Sparse System Direct Solver Library SuperLU_MT in State Estimation
papers.abstract: 针对电力系统状态估计中大规模稀疏线性方程组的求解问题，提出了一种基于并行稀疏系统直接求解库SuperLU_MT的快速求解方法。
papers.abstractEn: A fast solution method based on parallel sparse system direct solver library SuperLU_MT is proposed for solving large-scale sparse linear equations in power system state estimation.
